description: Added per-category toggle to disable the submission edit time limit, added startup/shutdown automation with restore state so menus, leaderboards, and race info survive restarts, fixed double-save of race info messages in pin_race_info, and fixed channel list dropdown returning empty on new servers.

Added disable_auto_forfeit toggle for race and category with 2-minute test mode limit, fixed interaction hang in toggle_category_pin_recent by removing defer, added Paused race state for temporarily blocking submissions without closing the race, fixed leaderboard duplication on shutdown/startup cycle, and fixed restore ordering so menus post before leaderboards and race info.
